reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar. Muy buena atención. El contacto con la naturaleza lo hace íntimo y especial.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place. Excellent service. The connection with nature makes it intimate and special.

reviews.comment:
Es ideal para descansar en un viaje largo. Buenas instalaciones un parque hermoso para sentarse a tomar mate bajo los árboles y un negocio para comprar todo lo que se necesita

(Translated by Google)
It's ideal for resting on a long trip. Good facilities, a beautiful park to sit and drink mate under the trees, and a shop to buy everything you need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzdVl6VlJREAE

reviews.comment:
Es ideal para parar, en un lugar en donde no abundan las estaciones de servicio el parador es hermoso, cerca de la ruta, con juegos para los chicos y una gran cantidad de mesas para almorzar al aire libre.

(Translated by Google)
It's an ideal place to stop, in a place where gas stations aren't abundant. The rest stop is beautiful, close to the highway, with games for children and plenty of tables for outdoor lunch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcWUzbmJREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Zona de parrillas muy cuidada y sanitarios limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Well-maintained grilling area and clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzanNxM21BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace años que paramos en dicha estación tanto durante el viaje de ida a Tanti como de regreso y siempre notamos una excelente y esmerada atención. Coincido plenamente con la opinión de lo espectaculares sandwich caseros. Los playeros del ACA Tortugas,  muy atentos y serviciales

(Translated by Google)
We've been stopping at this station for years, both on our way to and from Tanti, and we've always found the service to be excellent and attentive. I fully agree with the review of the spectacular homemade sandwiches. The beach staff at ACA Tortugas are very attentive and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzbHEtY0pREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
